title: Outdated authentication library with known CVE
description: The project uses passport@0.4.1 which has a known session fixation vulnerability (CVE-2022-25896). This allows an attacker to hijack authenticated sessions.

title: Missing rate limiting on API endpoints
description: Public API endpoints lack rate limiting middleware, making the service vulnerable to brute-force attacks and denial-of-service.

title: Inconsistent error handling patterns
description: Services mix try/catch with .catch() and some paths swallow errors silently. This makes debugging difficult and can mask production issues.

title: Missing TypeScript strict mode in tsconfig
description: The tsconfig.json does not enable strict mode, allowing potential type safety issues to go undetected at compile time.
